title: Acetosella cumulata
taxonomy: Acetosella cumulata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. It is a member of the genus Acetosella, which consists of several species of plants. The Oxalidaceae family is a small family of flowering plants, commonly known as wood sorrels or oxalis. The classification of Acetosella cumulata places it within the order Oxalidales and the clade Asterids. This classification helps to organize and identify the plant within the larger context of plant taxonomy.
